qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: AST validation bypass in python_tools permits arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerability type and code location. Advisory describes path traversal in tar.extract() at src/praisonai/praisonai/cli/features/recipe.py:1170-1172. This finding describes AST validation bypass in python_tools.execute_code() at src/praisonai-agents/praisonaiagents/tools/python_tools.py. Different root cause (missing tar member validation vs. incomplete AST blacklist), different vulnerable component, different attack vector.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding matches the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes a path traversal vulnerability in praisonai recipe unpack command via missing tar.extract() member validation at src/praisonai/praisonai/cli/features/recipe.py:1170-1172. The qualifying_vuln finding describes AST validation bypass in python_tools.execute_code() at src/praisonai-agents/praisonaiagents/tools/python_tools.py. This finding does not identify the missing tar member path validation that is the root cause of the advisory vulnerability.
evidence: Advisory root cause: tar.extract() without member path validation for '..' segments, absolute paths, or symlinks
python-code-execution-bypass root cause: Incomplete AST validation blacklist missing getattr(__builtins__, ...) indirect access
Finding does not reference recipe.py, tar.extract(), or the unpack command
